productDisplayName: Puma Women Abbey Grey Casual Shoes
description: Style reaches it new height with puma Abbey women's shoes. Pair these high ankle sneakers with short skirts and tanks for a chic look.UpperSynthetic leather, suede, nylon and mesh upper for style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and snug FitUpper stitched to the outsole for maximum durabilityLeather formstripe detail on the sidesHigh ankle support for comfort to the lower legBrand name embossed on the heel guard and ankle for styleMidsoleBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort.TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioningOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and gripPivot point below the big toe mound for flexible 180 degree movement of the feetshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
